case_title: MATTHEW TAYLOR DURRETT VS. SAL BALISTRERI

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-29-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BALISTRERI, SAL
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-09-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-09-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,300.00 FILED BY DURRETT, MATTHEW TAYLOR AS TO DEFENDANT BALISTRERI, SAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-09-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-09-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DURRETT, MATTHEW TAYLOR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BALISTRERI, SAL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
